title: No Bedrock
description: Removes bedrock from overworld and nether
body:
Removes generation of bedrock in newly generated chunks in overworld or nether

If you fall in end you will be teleported to overworld

If you fall in overworld you will be teleported to nether

P.S.

Restart your server if you play in one or reenter the world if yoz play in singleplayer.
